results.title: Search Tour

bugs.title: Tour card links lead to 404 - Page not found errors
bugs.description: During the 'Search Tour' automated test, after performing a search and displaying tour listings on the /book-trips-holiday page, clicking on any tour card resulted in a '404 - Page not found' error. This issue prevents users from accessing tour product pages, adding tours to the cart, and proceeding to checkout.
bugs.expected: Clicking on a tour card should navigate to the corresponding tour product page, displaying details about the tour.
bugs.actual: Clicking on a tour card results in a '404 - Page not found' error.

assertions.evidence: Tour links are broken, leading to 404 - Page not found errors. Cannot access tour product page to add to cart or proceed to checkout.

results.agentOutput: A bug has been recorded with the ID "BUG-1770937166860".
